   "reasoning": "I don't need more empty promises or pointless reports, I need money to stay in school and not have to choose between books and dinner. Scholarships and staff hiring can actually make a difference, but only if they're done right and with real resources. Attendance mandates just don't get it - how can they expect us to be in class if we're struggling to make ends meet?",
   "confidence": 0.85
}
